hausa.explore_drag_the_protractor_name_the_a: Bincika — ja protractor, sa wa kusurwa suna
hausa.acute_90_right_90_obtuse_90_180_straig: Mai kaifi < 90°, madaidaici = 90°, mai fadi 90–180°, kai tsaye = 180°, reflex > 180°. An ƙirƙira protractor kusan 1801; siffarsa ta rabin da'ira har yanzu ana amfani da ita a kowane aji na geometry.
hausa.estimation_builds_spatial_sense_precis: Kiyasi yana gina fahimtar sarari; auna daidai yana gina al'adar amfani da protractor. Common Core 4.MD.5–7: ɗauki kusurwa a matsayin sashe na cikakken juyi (1/360 na juyi ɗaya).
hausa.complementary_sum_to_90_supplementary_: Kusurwoyin complementary suna haɗuwa zuwa 90°; supplementary 180°; kusurwoyin vertical suna daidai; kusurwoyin alternate interior suna dacewa idan layuka biyu suna a layi ɗaya. Waɗannan gaskiya huɗu suna buɗe yawancin hujjoji na sakandare.
hausa.tools_bisector_second_ray_calculator: Kayan aiki — bisector, ray na biyu, kalkuleta
hausa.bisect_cut_in_half_the_construction_wi: Bisection = yanke gida biyu daidai (ginin da kamfas + sirara yana cikin Euclid Elements, Littafi na I, Shawara 9). Kayan aikin zamani: protractor, sarar kusurwa, theodolite — ra'ayi ɗaya, an daidaita.
hausa.pin_this_angle_on_protractor: Ka manne wannan kusurwa a protractor
hausa.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips: Danna don samun shawarwarin kusurwa na keɓaɓɓe!
hausa.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips_2: Danna don samun shawarwarin kusurwa na keɓaɓɓe!
hausa.look_at_the_angle_on_the_protractor_nu: Duba kusurwa a protractor (an ɓoye lambobi). Digiri nawa?
hausa.two_angles_that_add_to_90: Kusurwoyi biyu da suke haɗuwa zuwa 90°
hausa.two_angles_that_add_to_180: Kusurwoyi biyu da suke haɗuwa zuwa 180°
hausa.opposite_angles_formed_by_intersecting: Kusurwoyi masu adawa da layukan da suke tsallakawa suka samar; koyaushe daidai
hausa.angles_that_share_a_common_vertex_and_: Kusurwoyin da suke raba kusurwar da gefe guda
hausa.no_angles_explored_yet: Ba a bincika wata kusurwa ba tukuna
hausa.two_rays_overlap_exactly_no_rotation: Ray biyu suna cika juna daidai. Babu juyi.
hausa.less_than_a_right_angle_pizza_slice_le: Ƙarami fiye da kusurwa madaidaici. Yankin pizza, «ƙarami fiye da kusurwar square».
hausa.between_right_and_straight_wider_than_: Tsakanin madaidaici da kai tsaye. Fadi fiye da kusurwar square.
hausa.half_rotation_the_two_rays_form_a_stra: Rabin juyi. Ray biyu suna samar da layi kai tsaye.
hausa.greater_than_a_straight_angle_measure_: Girma fiye da kusurwar kai tsaye. Auna gefen «waje» na kusurwa.
hausa.complete_turn_the_two_rays_overlap_exa: Cikakken juyi. Ray biyu suna cika juna daidai (kamar 0°, amma ya juya cikakken zagaye ɗaya).
hausa.interactive_geometry_references_pick_a: Nassoshin geometry masu hulɗa — zaɓi batu.
hausa.careers_using_angles: Ayyukan da suke amfani da kusurwa
hausa.interior_angle_sum_n_2_180_for_any_n_s: Jimlar kusurwar ciki = (n − 2) × 180° ga kowane n-gon. Kowace kusurwar waje ta polygon na yau da kullun = 360°/n. Jimlar kusurwoyin waje koyaushe = 360°.
hausa.soh_cah_toa_sine_opp_hyp_cosine_adj_hy: SOH-CAH-TOA: sine = gaba/hypotenuse, cosine = kusa/hypotenuse, tangent = gaba/kusa. Ayyukan trigonometry suna ba da ratio na gefunan right triangle; an faɗaɗa zuwa dukan kusurwoyi ta unit circle.
hausa.these_angles_their_trig_values_are_wor: Waɗannan kusurwoyi + darajojin su na trig sun cancanci haddacewa — suna bayyana akai-akai a lissafi, physics, da injiniyanci.
hausa.1_rad_180_57_296_1_180_0_01745_rad_1_g: 1 rad = 180/π ≈ 57.296°. 1° = π/180 ≈ 0.01745 rad. 1 gradian = 0.9°. Yawancin kalkuleta suna da maɓallin yanayin digiri/radian — tabbatar kana a yanayi daidai!
hausa.bearings_measured_clockwise_from_north: Ana auna alkibla ta hanyar agogo daga arewa. Kamfas na yau da kullun na maki 16 yana da 22.5° tsakanin alkiblun kusa.
hausa.three_views_of_the_same_trigonometric_: Ra'ayoyi uku na wannan yanayin trigonometry. Ja silaida na kusurwa (ko tsayin hasumiya) — wakilci uku suna sabuntawa lokaci guda. Sannan yi jarabawar matsalar juyawa: warware ma'auni na gaske daga wakilci ɗaya kaɗai.
hausa.change_the_angle_and_watch_all_three_u: Canza kusurwa ka kalli uku suna sabuntawa tare — «ra'ayi ɗaya, wakilci uku» yana nufin haka.
hausa.pisa_is_roughly_56_m_tall_leaning_4_to: (Hasumiyar Pisa tana da tsayin kusan 56 m, tana karkata ≈ 4° yau)
hausa.each_quiz_gives_you_partial_info_use_t: Kowace jarabawa tana ba ka bayani na ɓangare. Yi amfani da dangantakar da aka bayyana a sama don lissafa darajar da ta ɓace.
hausa.tip_rearrange_tan_opp_adj_if_you_know_: Nasiha: sake tsara tan(θ) = gaba/kusa — idan ka san θ da gefe ɗaya, za ka iya samun ɗayan. Idan ka san gefuna biyu, ɗauki arctangent.
hausa.area_two_sides_included_angle: Fadi (gefuna biyu + kusurwar da ke ciki)
hausa.quantity_with_both_magnitude_and_direc: Adadin da ke da girma da alkibla duka. Ana zana shi kamar kibiya. Misali: velocity, ƙarfi, displacement.
hausa.scalar_just_a_number_mass_temperature_: Scalar = lamba kawai (mass, zafi, lokaci). Vector = girma + alkibla.
hausa.place_tail_of_second_at_head_of_first_: Sa wutsiyar na biyu a kan kan na farko. Jimla = daga wutsiyar na farko zuwa kan na biyu.
hausa.place_tails_together_diagonal_of_paral: Sa wutsiyoyi tare. Diagonal na parallelogram = jimla.
hausa.vector_v_at_angle_v_v_cos_v_y_v_sin: Vector v a kusurwa θ: vₓ = v·cos θ, v_y = v·sin θ.
hausa.v_v_v_y_v_z_pythagoras_in_any_dimensio: |v| = √(vₓ² + v_y² + v_z²). Pythagoras a kowane dimension.
hausa.magnitude_1_v_v_v_often_called_the_dir: Girma 1. v̂ = v / |v|. Sau da yawa ana kiran «alkibla» na v.
hausa.a_b_a_b_cos_gives_scalar_zero_when_per: a·b = |a||b|cos θ. Yana ba da scalar. Sifili idan perpendicular. Negative idan kusurwa > 90°.
hausa.a_b_a_b_sin_n_gives_vector_perpendicul: a×b = |a||b|sin θ · n̂. Yana ba da vector perpendicular ga duka biyu. Girma = fadin parallelogram.
hausa.curl_fingers_from_a_to_b_thumb_points_: Naɗe yatsu daga a zuwa b. Babban yatsa yana nuna alkiblar a×b. (Coordinates na hannun dama.)
hausa.c_a_c_b_generates_a_plane_or_line_of_v: c₁·a + c₂·b. Yana samar da plane (ko layi) na vectors.
hausa.newton_s_2nd_law_f_ma_net_force_is_vec: Dokar 2 ta Newton: F = ma. Net force shine jimlar vector na dukan ƙarfi.
hausa.airplane_heading_wind_vector_ground_ve: Alkiblar jirgi + vector na iska → ground speed (jimlar vector).
hausa.regular_tessellations_3_only: Tessellation na yau da kullun (3 kawai)
hausa.equilateral_triangle_square_regular_he: Triangle mai gefe daidai, square, hexagon na yau da kullun. Polygon na yau kaɗai da suke tile plane su kaɗai.
hausa.interior_angle_must_divide_360_triangl: Dole kusurwar ciki ta raba 360° gaba ɗaya. Triangle 60° (×6), square 90° (×4), hexagon 120° (×3). Pentagon 108° ba ya raba 360° → ba zai iya tile shi kaɗai ba.
hausa.8_in_total_combine_multiple_regular_po: Jimla 8. Suna haɗa polygon da yawa na yau; tsari ɗaya a kowace vertex.
hausa.aperiodic_tiling_never_repeats_exactly: Tiling mara lokaci — ba ya sake maimaituwa daidai. Symmetry na sau 5. Ya zaburar da ganowar quasicrystal.
hausa.hexagonal_tiling_minimizes_total_perim: Ga fadi da aka bayar, hexagonal tiling yana rage jimlar kewaye. Hales ya tabbatar (1999). Dalilin da ya sa ƙudan zuma suke amfani da hexagon.
hausa.each_region_points_closest_to_one_seed: Kowane yanki = maki mafi kusa da wani «seed» point. Yana bayyana a yanayi (tabon rakumin dawa, tsagawar laka, tsarin cell).
hausa.on_a_hyperbolic_plane_regular_pentagon: A kan hyperbolic plane, pentagon na yau (da wasu siffofi da yawa) na iya tile. Jerin «Circle Limit» na M.C. Escher.
hausa.colored_squares_that_must_match_neighb: Square masu launi da dole su dace da maƙwabta a gefuna. Za su iya kwaikwayon Turing machine → matsalar tiling ta gaba ɗaya ba a iya yanke shawara.
hausa.a_single_tile_that_aperiodically_tiles: Tile guda ɗaya da yake tile plane ba tare da lokaci (siffofin «hula» da «fatalwa»). Babbar gano ta kwanan nan.
hausa.in_a_right_triangle_a_b_c_where_c_is_t: A right triangle, a² + b² = c² inda c shine hypotenuse. Uku-ukun integer (a, b, c) da suke cika ana kiran su uku-ukun Pythagoras. Uku-uku na «asali» ba su da common factor.
hausa.for_positive_integers_m_n_with_no_comm: Ga positive integer m > n ba tare da common factor ba kuma ba duka odd ba: a = m² − n², b = 2mn, c = m² + n². Gwada m=2, n=1 → (3,4,5).
hausa.3d_solids_volumes_and_surface_areas: ⬢ Solid na 3D — girma da fadin surface
hausa.careers_that_use_angles_every_day: 💼 Ayyukan da suke amfani da kusurwa kowace rana
hausa.circle_has_most_area_for_a_perimeter: Da'ira tana da fadi mafi girma ga kewaye da aka bayar
hausa.isoperimetric_inequality_4_a_p_equalit: Rashin daidaiton isoperimetric: 4πA ≤ P². Daidaito ga da'ira kawai. Dalilin da ya sa kumfar sabulu + duniyoyi suke sphere.
hausa.sphere_has_most_volume_for_a_surface_a: Sphere tana da girma mafi girma ga fadin surface da aka bayar
hausa.3d_version_of_above_single_bubbles_are: Sigar 3D na sama. Kumfa ɗaya sphere ne; kumfar da aka haɗa suna haɗuwa a 120°.
hausa.regular_hexagons_tile_most_efficiently: Hexagon na yau da kullun suna tile mafi inganci
hausa.honeycomb_conjecture_proven_1999_by_ha: Zato na honeycomb (Hales ya tabbatar 1999): cikin dukan rabe-raben plane, hexagonal tiling yana da jimlar tsayin gefen mafi ƙanƙanta ga kowace fadi.
hausa.cannot_be_deformed_without_changing_si: Ba za a iya lalata shi ba tare da canza tsayin gefe. Dalilin da ya sa gadoji + rufin truss suke amfani da triangle.
hausa.square_tiles_fill_the_plane_with_no_ga: Square tiles suna cika plane ba tare da rata. Rectangle + parallelogram ma haka.
hausa.circles_tile_poorly: Da'ira suna tile da rashin kyau
hausa.hexagonal_packing_of_circles_fills_90_: Hexagonal packing na da'ira yana cika ~90.7% na plane (mafi kyau da zai yiwu). Square packing ~78.5% kawai.
hausa.fcc_hcp_both_achieve_74_density_kepler: FCC + HCP duka suna kai ~74% density (zato na Kepler, Hales ya tabbatar 2014).
hausa.five_regular_polyhedra: Polyhedra biyar na yau da kullun
hausa.only_5_in_3d_tetrahedron_cube_octahedr: 5 kawai a 3D: tetrahedron, cube, octahedron, dodecahedron, icosahedron. (Plato ya tattauna.)
hausa.4_vertices_6_edges_4_faces_minimum_3d_: Vertices 4, edges 6, faces 4. Siffa mafi ƙanƙanta ta 3D.
hausa.for_sphere_inscribed_in_cylinder_h_2r_: Ga sphere da aka rubuta cikin cylinder (h = 2r): V_sphere = 2/3 × V_cylinder. (Sakamakon da Archimedes ya fi so.)
hausa.16_vertices_32_edges_24_faces_8_cells_: Vertices 16, edges 32, faces 24, cells 8. Za a iya buɗe shi cikin cube 8 (a cewar Salvador Dalí).
hausa.single_sided_surface_cut_down_middle_l: Surface mai gefe ɗaya. Yanke tsakiya → loop ɗaya mai tsayi. Yanke a 1/3 → loop biyu masu haɗi (ɗaya Möbius).
hausa.closed_non_orientable_surface_inside_o: Surface mai rufe wanda ba a iya jagoranci. Ciki = waje. A 3D ana iya yin shi kawai ta hanyar tsallaka kai.
hausa.curve_of_constant_width_not_a_circle_c: Curve na fadi mai dorewa (ba da'ira ba!). Katako yana mirginewa lami-lafiya a kan Reuleaux triangle masu mirgina. Drill bits suna amfani da shi.
hausa.two_parallel_polygons_rotated_360_2n_c: Polygon biyu masu layi ɗaya an juya 360°/2n, an haɗa da triangle. Tetrahedron shine antiprism mafi sauƙi.
hausa.has_chirality_left_right_handed_forms_: Yana da chirality — siffofin hannun hagu da dama. Ɗaya daga cikin chiral Archimedean solid biyu (ɗayan snub dodecahedron).
hausa.equation_z_xy_straight_lines_lie_on_it: Ma'auni z = xy. Layukan kai tsaye suna kwance a kansa cikin iyali 2. Ana amfani da shi a Pringles + wasu rufi.
hausa.gomboc_2006_is_first_known_mono_monost: «Gömböc» (2006) shine abu na farko da aka sani na mono-monostatic — daidaito ɗaya mai tsayawa + ɗaya mara tsayawa. Kamar kayan wasa da yake tsayawa da kansa.
hausa.cannot_tile_plane_alone_gaps_but_7_egg: Ba zai iya tile plane shi kaɗai — rata. Amma siffofin ƙwai 7 suna samar da tarin hexagonal.
hausa.common_in_crystals_cube_nacl_octahedro: Kowa a crystals: cube (NaCl), octahedron (lu'ulu'u, fluorite), dodecahedron (pyrite, garnet).
hausa.truncated_icosahedron_60_carbons_like_: Icosahedron da aka yanke. Carbon 60. Kamar tsarin ƙwallon ƙafa. An gano 1985.
hausa.helical_10_5_base_pairs_per_turn_major: Na helical, ~10.5 base pairs kowane juyi. Groove babba + groove ƙarami. Diameter mai dorewa ~2 nanometer.
hausa.hexagonal_prisms_with_rhombic_bottoms_: Hexagonal prisms masu rhombic bottoms. Ƙudan zuma ba sa lissafi da sani — biophysics tana rage fadi ta atomatik.
hausa.drop_spaghetti_at_random_average_numbe: Zubar da spaghetti bazuwar — matsakaicin adadin haɗuwa = (L/πd) × π × n. Ana amfani da shi don kiyasin π a aji.
hausa.study_of_flags_comes_from_latin_vexill: Nazarin tutoci. Daga Latin vexillum (tutar da mahaya na Roma suka ɗauka).
hausa.keep_it_simple_a_child_can_draw_from_m: Ka sa mai sauƙi (yaro zai iya zana daga ƙwaƙwalwa), yi amfani da alama mai ma'ana, launuka na asali 2–3, babu haruffa ko alama, ka kasance na musamman.
hausa.most_common_2_3_e_g_france_germany_us_: Mafi kowa: 2:3 (misali Faransa, Jamus). US 1:1.9. UK 1:2. Wasu marasa kowa: Switzerland 1:1, Nepal ba rectangle ba.
hausa.symbols_added_to_flag_stars_crosses_an: Alamun da aka ƙara wa tuta (taurari, gicciye, dabbobi). Kalmomin heraldic suna bayyana matsayin su.
hausa.upper_left_rectangle_about_1_4_the_fla: Rectangle na sama-hagu (kusan 1/4 na tuta). Taurarin US suna nan. Australia, New Zealand ma suna amfani da canton design.
hausa.hoist_side_attached_to_pole_fly_opposi: Gefen ɗagawa = gefen da aka haɗa da sanda. Gefen tashi = gefen adawa (na kyauta).
hausa.red_courage_revolution_blood_blue_ocea: Ja = jaruntaka, juyi, jini. Shuɗi = teku, sama, 'yanci. Kore = ƙasa, yanayi, Musulunci. Fari = zaman lafiya, tsarki. Rawaya/zinariya = wadata, rana.
hausa.flying_flag_upside_down_where_asymmetr: Tashiwa tuta juye (inda akwai rashin symmetry); rabin sanda = makoki.
hausa.light_blue_with_map_un_or_compass_nato: Shuɗi mai haske da taswira (UN) ko kamfas (NATO). Da gangan yana guje wa alamun ƙasa/addini.
hausa.flags_are_codified_geometry_every_nati: Tutoci geometry ne da aka tsara. Kowace tutar ƙasa tana da ƙayyadaddun ƙayyadaddun: ratio, lambobin launi, matsayin alama, kusurwoyin taurari.
hausa.x_12_means_x_inches_rise_per_12_inches: X:12 yana nufin hawan inci X ga kowane inci 12 na gudu na kwance.
hausa.149_597_870_700_m_defined_exactly_ligh: 149,597,870,700 m. An bayyana daidai. Haske yana tsallaka 1 AU cikin ~8.3 minti.
hausa.9_461_10_m_distance_light_travels_in_1: 9.461×10¹⁵ m. Nisan da haske ke tafiya cikin shekara 1 ta Julian.
hausa.3_26_light_years_distance_at_which_1_a: ~3.26 shekarun haske. Nisan da 1 AU ke yin kusurwar arcsecond 1.
hausa.165_au_2024_fastest_human_made_object_: ~165 AU (2024). Abu mafi sauri da mutum ya yi da yake barin tsarin rana. Har yanzu yana aika data.
hausa.620_million_tons_of_h_he_every_second_: H → He ~620 miliyan ton kowane daƙiƙa. Yana asarar ~4 miliyan ton kamar makamashi (E = mc²).
hausa.stream_of_charged_particles_400_800_km: Rafi na charged particles. ~400–800 km/daƙiƙa kusa da duniya. Yana haifar da aurora + tsara wutsiyar tauraro mai wutsiya.
hausa.solar_system_planets_dwarf_planets: 🪐 Duniyoyi + dwarf planets na tsarin rana
hausa.axial_tilt_drives_seasons_tilt_90_mean: Karkatar axis tana tuƙi yanayi. Karkata > 90° yana nufin retrograde rotation (Venus, Uranus, Pluto).
hausa.can_you_cross_each_of_the_7_bridges_of: Za ka iya tsallaka kowane daga cikin gadoji 7 na Königsberg daidai sau ɗaya?
hausa.no_euler_proved_1736_you_need_each_nod: A'a. Euler ya tabbatar (1736) kowace node dole ta kasance da even degree, sai dai har node 2 na odd-degree. Königsberg tana da node 4 na odd-degree. Wannan ya kafa tushen graph theory.
hausa.using_only_compass_straightedge_constr: Ta amfani da kamfas + straightedge kawai, gina square mai fadi daidai da da'ira da aka bayar.
hausa.impossible_is_transcendental_lindemann: Ba zai yiwu ba. π transcendental ne (Lindemann 1882). Ba za a iya gina shi da iyakantattun ayyukan kamfas da straightedge ba.
hausa.construct_a_cube_with_twice_the_volume: Gina da kamfas + straightedge cube mai ninka girma na cube da aka bayar.
hausa.impossible_requires_2_which_is_algebra: Ba zai yiwu ba. Yana buƙatar ∛2, wanda algebraic ne na degree 3, yayin da kamfas da straightedge suke gina lambobin degree 2ⁿ kawai.
hausa.divide_an_arbitrary_angle_into_3_equal: Raba kowace kusurwa cikin sassa 3 daidai da kamfas + straightedge.
hausa.impossible_in_general_some_specific_an: Ba zai yiwu ba gaba ɗaya. Wasu kusurwoyi na musamman (kamar 180°) suna yiwuwa. Origami na iya raba kowace kusurwa uku.
hausa.given_two_circles_how_do_they_relate: An bayar da da'ira biyu, ta yaya suke da alaƙa?
hausa.5_cases_separate_externally_tangent_in: Yanayi 5: rabe, tangent na waje, tsallakawa (maki 2), tangent na ciki, ɗaya cikin ɗaya.
hausa.can_every_planar_map_be_colored_with_4: Za a iya launin kowace planar map da launuka 4 ta yadda babu yankuna biyu masu kusa da suke raba launi?
hausa.yes_proven_by_appel_haken_1976_first_m: Ee. Appel + Haken sun tabbatar (1976) — ka'idar babba ta farko da aka tabbatar da taimakon kwamfuta.
hausa.what_path_from_a_to_b_b_lower_minimize: Wace hanya daga A zuwa B (B ƙasa) tana rage lokacin abu da yake zamewa ƙasa da gravity?
hausa.cycloid_posed_by_bernoulli_1696_solved: Cycloid. Bernoulli ya gabatar (1696). Newton ya warware cikin dare ɗaya + wasu 4 (haɗe da Leibniz).
hausa.cut_a_circular_pizza_into_8_sectors_wi: Yanke pizza mai zagaye cikin sector 8 da yankan da suke wucewa ta wani point (ba lallai cibiya ba). Guntun da suke canzawa suna da fadi daidai.
hausa.true_for_any_odd_multiple_of_4_sectors: Gaskiya ga kowane odd multiple na sector 4. Yana aiki da 8, 12, 16…
hausa.for_what_radii_of_intersecting_circles: Ga wace radii na da'ira masu tsallakawa siffar wata («lune») + lens suke da fadi daidai?
hausa.ratio_depends_solved_analytically_roma: Ratio ya dogara — an warware shi da analysis. Geometry na soyayya daga littafin 1942.
hausa.intersection_of_two_perpendicular_cyli: Tsallakawar cylinder biyu masu perpendicular na radius daidai.
hausa.has_4_vertices_looks_like_a_4_faced_cu: Yana da vertices 4, yana kama da matashin kai mai fuska 4. Girma = (16/3)r³.
hausa.drop_a_needle_of_length_l_onto_paralle: Zubar da allura mai tsayin L a kan layuka masu layi ɗaya masu tazara d. Menene yiwuwar allura ta yanke wani layi?
hausa.2l_d_for_l_d_method_to_compute_by_drop: 2L/(πd) ga L ≤ d. Hanyar lissafin π ta hanyar zubar da allura!
hausa.can_you_cut_a_circle_into_pieces_rearr: Za ka iya yanke da'ira cikin guntu, sake tsara zuwa square mai fadi daidai?
hausa.yes_laczkovich_1990_with_10_pieces_cho: Ee (Laczkovich 1990) — da guntu ~10⁵⁰. Yana buƙatar axiom of choice. Yanke da almakashi ba zai yiwu ba; guntu suna da ban mamaki.
hausa.can_you_cut_a_ball_into_pieces_rearran: Za ka iya yanke ƙwallo cikin guntu, sake tsara zuwa ƙwallo biyu masu girma daidai?
hausa.yes_requires_axiom_of_choice_non_measu: Ee — yana buƙatar axiom of choice + guntu marasa aunawa. Ya saɓa da hankali amma daidai a lissafi.
hausa.soap_film_minimal_surface: Ƙananan surface na fim na sabulu
hausa.why_do_soap_films_take_certain_shapes: Me ya sa fim na sabulu suke ɗaukar wasu siffofi?
hausa.they_minimize_surface_area_catenoid_be: Suna rage fadin surface. Catenoid (tsakanin zobe), Plateau border (haɗi). Suna ba da geometry mai kyau.
hausa.simplest_regular_tiling_schl_fli_symbo: Regular tiling mafi sauƙi. Alamar Schläfli {4,4}.
hausa.3_hexagons_around_each_vertex_6_3_hone: Hexagon 3 kewaye kowace vertex. {6,3}. Honeycomb. Mafi inganci.
hausa.octagons_squares_4_8_8_hispanic_coloni: Octagon + square (4.8.8). Tsarin tile na mulkin mallaka na Hispanic.
hausa.squares_triangles_3_3_4_3_4_chiral_has: Square + triangle (3.3.4.3.4). Chiral — yana da handedness.
hausa.just_rhombi_can_be_combined_to_make_pe: Rhombi kawai. Za a iya haɗa su don yin Penrose tiling.
hausa.two_rhombi_fat_thin_aperiodic_never_re: Rhombi biyu (mai kauri + mai sirara). Mara lokaci — ba ya sake maimaituwa. Symmetry na sau 5.
hausa.kite_dart_aperiodic_with_5_fold_symmet: Kite + dart. Mara lokaci da symmetry na sau 5.
hausa.right_triangles_arranged_in_pinwheels_: Right triangle da aka tsara cikin pinwheels. Mara lokaci. An yi amfani da shi a tiles na Federation Square (Melbourne).
hausa.single_polygon_that_tiles_aperiodicall: Polygon guda ɗaya da yake tile mara lokaci. Babbar ganon kwanan nan na Smith, Myers, Kaplan, Goodman-Strauss.
hausa.improvement_on_hat_uses_only_direct_no: Ingantawa a kan «hula» — yana amfani da tiles kai tsaye (marasa reflection) kawai.
hausa.5_sided_tiles_found_in_cairo_street_pa: Tiles masu gefe 5. An samu a shimfidar titin Cairo. Kowace tile tana da kusurwa 4 na ~120° + kusurwa ɗaya na 90°.
hausa.use_2_vertex_types_14_distinct_ones_so: Suna amfani da nau'in vertex 2. Akwai 14 daban (wasu masu jayayya). Mafi rikitarwa fiye da nau'in Archimedes.
hausa.divide_plane_into_cells_closest_to_eac: Raba plane cikin cell mafi kusa da kowace «seed» point. Yana bayyana a yanayi (tabon rakumin dawa, kumfa).
hausa.triangle_mesh_with_property_that_no_po: Triangle mesh mai dukiyar cewa babu point cikin circumscribed circle na kowace triangle. Dual na Voronoi diagram.
hausa.15_distinct_convex_pentagon_shapes_can: Siffofin convex pentagon 15 daban za su iya tile plane. Na ƙarshe an gano 2015 (Mann, McLoud, Von Derau). Marjorie Rice, mai son, ta gano 4 a shekarun 1970.
hausa.heptagons_impossible_in_euclidean_tile: Heptagon (ba zai yiwu ba a Euclidean plane) yana tile hyperbolic plane da 3 kewaye kowace vertex. Escher ya zana.
hausa.square_tiles_with_curves_or_diagonals_: Square tiles masu curves ko diagonals. Alkiblar bazuwar → tsarin kamar maze.
hausa.latitude_longitude_in_decimal_degrees_: Latitude + longitude a digiri na decimal. Latitude: 0° = equator, ±90° = pole. Longitude: 0° = Greenwich, ±180° = kusa da International Date Line.
hausa.at_each_vertex_you_need_3_polygons_who: A kowace vertex kana buƙatar polygon 3+ waɗanda jimlar kusurwa < 360° (in ba haka ba lebur ko ba zai yiwu ba). Haɗi 5 kawai suke aiki ga polygon na yau.
hausa.v_e_f_2_holds_for_every_convex_polyhed: V − E + F = 2 gaskiya ne ga kowace convex polyhedron (haɗe da dukan 5 Platonic solid).
hausa.connecting_face_centers_of_a_platonic_: Haɗa cibiyoyin fuska na Platonic solid yana ba da «dual» ɗinsa. Cube ↔ octahedron; dodecahedron ↔ icosahedron; tetrahedron ↔ kansa.
hausa.13_semi_regular_solids_same_arrangemen: Solid 13 na kusan-yau — tsari ɗaya a kowace vertex, amma nau'o'in polygon da yawa. Haɗe da truncated icosahedron (tsarin ƙwallon ƙafa).
hausa.4_regular_star_polyhedra_with_pentagra: Star polyhedra 4 na yau da pentagram faces ko vertices. Ba convex ba.
hausa.start_with_triangle_on_each_side_repla: Fara da triangle. A kowane gefe, maye gurbin tsakiya na uku da gefuna biyu na ƙaramar triangle. Maimaita. Kewaye mara iyaka, fadi mai iyaka.
hausa.start_with_triangle_remove_middle_smal: Fara da triangle. Cire triangle na tsakiya (ƙarami). Maimaita a kowace triangle da ta rage. Hausdorff dimension log(3)/log(2) ≈ 1.585.
hausa.remove_middle_third_of_segment_repeat_: Cire uku na tsakiya na segment. Maimaita a kowane segment da ya rage. Mara ƙidaya mara iyaka amma jimlar tsayi sifili.
hausa.points_c_where_iterating_z_z_c_stays_b: Maki c inda maimaita z = z² + c ya kasance bounded. Cikakkun bayanai marasa iyaka a kowane zoom. An gano 1980.
hausa.for_each_c_points_z_where_iterating_z_: Ga kowane c, maki z inda maimaita z = z² + c ya kasance bounded. Kowane c yana ba da Julia set daban; tare suna tile Mandelbrot set.
hausa.fold_a_strip_of_paper_in_half_repeated: Naɗe tsiri na takarda gida biyu akai-akai; buɗe kowane naɗi zuwa 90°. Ko maye gurbin segment na kai-tsaye.
hausa.iterated_function_system_random_select: Iterated function system. Zaɓin bazuwar cikin affine maps 4 yana samar da siffar ganyen fern.
hausa.fractional_dimension_coastline_1_2_1_3: Fractional dimension. Bakin teku ~1.2–1.3 gwargwadon ƙasa. Yana kama «rashin sanƙo» fiye da integer dimensions.
hausa.defining_property_strict_self_similari: Dukiyar ma'anar. Self-similarity mai tsanani (Koch) ko statistical (bakin teku).
hausa.coastlines_trees_lungs_bronchi_blood_v: Bakin teku, bishiyoyi, huhu (bronchi), jijiyoyin jini, hanyoyin sadarwa na kogi, jerin duwatsu, gizagizai, walƙiya.
hausa.flat_plane_parallel_postulate_holds_an: Lebur plane. Parallel postulate yana aiki. Kusurwoyin triangle suna yin 180° daidai.
hausa.surface_of_sphere_triangle_angles_sum_: Surface na sphere. Jimlar kusurwoyin triangle ta wuce 180°. Ragi yana daidai da fadi. Ana amfani a navigation.
hausa.saddle_shaped_surface_triangle_angles_: Surface mai siffar sirdi. Jimlar kusurwoyin triangle ƙasa da 180°. Layuka masu layi ɗaya da yawa ta point waje da layi.
hausa.shortest_paths_on_a_surface_straight_l: Hanyoyi mafi guntu a kan surface. Layukan kai tsaye (Euclidean); great circles (sphere); hyperbolic lines (hyperbolic).
hausa.largest_circles_on_a_sphere_equator_me: Manyan da'ira a kan sphere. Equator + meridians. Jiragen suna bin hanyoyin great circle.
hausa.euclidean_0_spherical_positive_hyperbo: Euclidean = 0. Spherical = positive. Hyperbolic = negative. Curvature yana ƙayyade geometry.
hausa.on_sphere_of_radius_r_triangle_area_r_: A kan sphere na radius R, fadin triangle = R² × (jimlar kusurwa − π).
hausa.positions_on_earth_s_surface_use_spher: Matsayi a kan surface na duniya suna amfani da spherical (ko mafi daidai, ellipsoidal) geometry.
hausa.nyc_to_tokyo_is_shortest_via_the_arcti: New York zuwa Tokyo mafi guntu ta hanyar Arctic, ba kai tsaye gabas ba — wannan great circle ne.
hausa.spacetime_is_curved_by_mass_energy_geo: Spacetime ana lanƙwasa shi da mass-energy. Geodesics su ne hanyoyin da abubuwan da suke faɗuwa cikin 'yanci suke bi a curved spacetime.
hausa.a_vertical_or_angled_gnomon_casts_a_sh: «Gnomon» na tsaye ko na karkata yana jefa inuwa. Yayin da duniya ke juyawa, inuwa tana motsawa a kan alamomi.
hausa.for_accuracy_gnomon_must_be_parallel_t: Don daidaito, gnomon dole ya kasance layi ɗaya da axis na duniya — kusurwa daga kwance = latitude na gida.
hausa.dial_plate_perpendicular_to_gnomon_par: Dial plate perpendicular ga gnomon (layi ɗaya da equator). Layukan sa'a suna da tazara daidai na 15°.
hausa.dial_plate_parallel_to_ground_hour_lin: Dial plate layi ɗaya da ƙasa. Layukan sa'a suna da tazara mara daidai — dabara: tan(kusurwar layin sa'a) = sin(latitude) × tan(kusurwar sa'a).
hausa.dial_on_a_wall_hour_lines_depend_on_wa: Dial a bango. Layukan sa'a sun dogara da alkiblar bango + latitude.
hausa.sundial_time_differs_from_clock_time_b: Lokacin agogon rana ya bambanta da lokacin agogo har ~16 minti shekara guda. Saboda elliptical orbit na duniya + axial tilt.
hausa.figure_8_trace_of_sun_s_position_at_sa: Alamar siffa-8 na matsayin rana a lokaci ɗaya na agogo kowace rana shekara guda. Ana nunawa a wasu manyan agogon rana.
hausa.sundial_shows_local_apparent_solar_tim: Agogon rana yana nuna local apparent solar time. Ya bambanta da civil time saboda bambancin longitude cikin time zone + daylight saving.
hausa.very_precise_sundials_with_corrections: Agogon rana masu daidai sosai da gyara na equation of time + longitude. Daidai har daƙiƙa.
hausa.phi_1_61803398874989_irrational_roots_: φ (phi) ≈ 1.61803398874989… irrational. Root na x² = x + 1.
hausa.a_line_divided_so_that_whole_larger_la: Layi da aka raba ta yadda duka : babba = babba : ƙarami. (a+b)/a = a/b = φ.
hausa.ratio_of_consecutive_fibonacci_numbers: Ratio na lambobin Fibonacci masu jere ya kusanci φ: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21 → 21/13 ≈ 1.615.
hausa.long_side_short_side_remove_a_square_r: Gefe mai tsawo / gefe ƙarami = φ. Cire square → rectangle da ya rage ma zinariya ne.
hausa.logarithmic_spiral_with_growth_factor_: Logarithmic spiral da growth factor φ kowane kwata na juyi. Ana kusatawa da Fibonacci squares + arcs.
hausa.ratios_of_pentagram_diagonals_to_sides: Ratio na diagonals na pentagram zuwa gefuna = φ. Pythagoras ya san wannan.
hausa.spiral_arrangements_in_sunflowers_pine: A tsarin spiral na sunflower, pine cone, kwar'in nautilus. Yana nuna packing mafi kyau ga growing meristems.
hausa.often_claimed_in_parthenon_mona_lisa_e: Sau da yawa ana da'awar cewa yana a Parthenon, Mona Lisa, da sauransu — yawancin da'awa ba su da tushe. Zinariyar fasaha ta gaske: amfani da gangan a ƙarni na 20 (Le Corbusier, Dalí).
hausa.long_believed_humans_find_golden_ratio: An daɗe ana gaskata mutane suna ganin zinariyar ratio ta fi kyau. Tabbataccen shaida ya fi rauni fiye da yadda labarai na kowa suke nunawa.
hausa.1_1_1_1_1_1_most_irrational_number_slo: φ = 1 + 1/(1 + 1/(1 + 1/(…))). Lamba «mafi irrational» — continued fraction mafi jinkirin haɗuwa.
hausa.active_research_area_can_solve_cubic_e: Yankin bincike mai aiki. Zai iya warware cubic equations (ba zai yiwu ba da kamfas + straightedge kawai). Yana da alaƙa da algebra.
hausa.at_any_flat_foldable_vertex_mountain_f: A kowace flat-foldable vertex, |mountain folds − valley folds| = 2.
hausa.at_a_flat_foldable_vertex_alternating_: A flat-foldable vertex, kusurwoyin da suke canzawa kewaye vertex suna haɗuwa zuwa 180°.
hausa.standard_paper_can_be_folded_in_half_7: Takarda ta yau da kullun za a iya naɗe ta gida biyu sau ~7. Kowane naɗi yana ninka kauri. Bayan 7, takarda ta yi kauri sosai. Rikodi (da kayan aiki na musamman + takarda mai girma sosai): naɗi 12.
hausa.flat_sheet_can_fold_into_virtually_any: Takarda lebur za a iya naɗe ta zuwa kusan kowace siffar 3D idan an naɗe isasshe. Origami na zamani yana da rikitarwa sosai.
hausa.real_world_space_telescopes: Duniya ta gaske: telescopes na sararin samaniya
hausa.james_webb_space_telescope_sunshield_f: Sunshield na James Webb Space Telescope an naɗe don ƙaddamarwa (ka'idar origami), an buɗe a sararin samaniya.
hausa.folded_efficiently_to_fit_in_compartme: An naɗe da inganci don shiga ɗaki, suna buɗewa da sauri.
hausa.origami_inspired_medical_stents_fold_t: Stents na likita da origami ya zaburar suna naɗewa ƙanana don shigarwa, suna faɗaɗa cikin artery.
hausa.parallelogram_based_fold_lets_large_su: Naɗi na tushen parallelogram yana barin babban surface (solar panel) ya buɗe daga ƙunshin da aka danne da ja ɗaya.
hausa.cuts_allowed_in_addition_to_folds_used: An yarda da yankewa ban da naɗi. Ana amfani da shi ga littattafan pop-up + tsarin kimiyya.
hausa.parallel_lines_converge_to_vanishing_p: Layukan a layi ɗaya suna haɗuwa zuwa vanishing points. Point 1 (kallon hanya), points 2 (kusurwar gini), points 3 (kallon hasumiya sama).
hausa.where_parallel_lines_appear_to_meet_on: Inda layukan a layi ɗaya suke bayyana suna haɗuwa a horizon. Ana ƙayyade shi da matsayin mai kallo + alkiblar layi.
hausa.horizontal_line_at_viewer_s_eye_height: Layin kwance a tsayin ido na mai kallo. Dukan vanishing points suna a kansa (ga layukan a layi ɗaya da ƙasa).
hausa.objects_pointing_at_viewer_appear_comp: Abubuwan da suke nuni ga mai kallo suna bayyana matse. Zana hannu da yake nuni ga mai kallo = ƙalubale.
hausa.divide_canvas_photo_into_9_equal_secti: Raba canvas/hoto cikin sassa 9 daidai. Sa batutuwa a mahaɗai don haɗi mai motsi.
hausa.camera_tilted_off_horizontal_creates_u: Kamara da aka karkatar daga kwance yana haifar da rashin nutsuwa, rashin tsayuwa, motsi.
hausa.sun_angle_determines_shadow_length_dir: Kusurwar rana tana ƙayyade tsayin + alkiblar inuwa. Kusurwa ƙasa (zinariyar sa'a) = inuwa mai tsawo + launuka masu ɗumi.
hausa.brunelleschi_1413_demonstrated_mathema: Brunelleschi (~1413) ya nuna mathematical linear perspective. Alberti ya tsara shi (1435).
hausa.distant_objects_appear_bluer_less_dist: Abubuwa masu nisa suna bayyana shuɗi + marasa fitowa saboda atmospheric scattering.
hausa.some_traditions_use_specific_angles_ra: Wasu al'adu suna amfani da kusurwoyi + ratio na musamman (tsarin geometry na Musulunci, mandala na Indiya, cathedral na Gothic).
hausa.mathematical_artist_impossible_objects: Mai fasahar lissafi. Abubuwan da ba za su yiwu ba (Penrose triangles), tessellation, hyperbolic geometry.
hausa.folding_angles_crease_patterns_produce: Kusurwoyin naɗi + tsarin naɗi suna samar da sculpture na 3D daga takarda lebur.
hausa.curves_formed_when_a_plane_intersects_: Curves da aka samar lokacin da plane ya tsallaka cone (mai nap biyu). Kusurwar plane dangane da axis na cone yana ƙayyade nau'in curve.
hausa.the_only_5_convex_regular_polyhedra_al: 5 kaɗai na convex regular polyhedra. Dukan faces polygon na yau da suke daidai, adadi ɗaya yana haɗuwa a kowace vertex.
hausa.shapes_that_exhibit_self_similarity_at: Siffofin da suke nuna self-similarity a kowace scale. Benoit Mandelbrot (1975) ya ƙirƙira kalmar daga Latin fractus, «karyewa».
hausa.geometries_on_curved_surfaces_euclid_s: Geometry a kan curved surfaces. Parallel postulate na Euclid ba ya aiki. An gano a shekarun 1820 (Lobachevsky, Bolyai, Gauss).
hausa.projecting_curved_earth_onto_a_flat_ma: Radiawa duniya mai lanƙwasa a kan flat map koyaushe yana gurbata wani abu — kusurwa, fadi, nesa, ko siffa. Kowace projection an inganta ta don amfani daban.
hausa.many_popular_claims_about_the_golden_r: Yawancin da'awa masu shahara game da zinariyar ratio a fasaha, gine-gine, da «kyau» ba su da tushe ko an ƙara su baya. Dukiyar lissafi ta gaske + kyau; da'awar al'ada sau da yawa ba haka ba.
hausa.origami_connects_geometry_to_engineeri: Origami yana haɗa geometry da injiniyanci, ilmin halitta, da zayyana. Ka'idodin lissafi suna ƙayyade waɗanne naɗi suke yiwuwa.
hausa.many_athletic_skills_depend_on_launch_: Ƙwarewar wasanni da yawa sun dogara da launch angle. «45° mafi kyau» na gargajiya gaskiya ne kawai ga projectile da ake harbawa + saukowa a tsayi ɗaya (ba tare da air resistance ba).
